title: client_task: reset sse_auth_failed when SSE StateChange arrives
description: The sse_auth_failed flag is set to true when SSE auth fails (correctly suppressing reconnect). However, it is never reset to false. If future code changes allow credential refresh mid-session, a past auth failure would permanently suppress reconnect even after success. Defensively reset sse_auth_failed = false in the SseNotification::StateChange arm.
